task: Fix Wave 1 API smoke upgrade code review blockers

blocker_resolution_mapping.blocker: Remote --base-url could run mutating smoke remotely
blocker_resolution_mapping.resolution: Mutating Wave 1 smoke now parses --base-url before startup and only allows http localhost, 127.0.0.1, or loopback IPv6.
blocker_resolution_mapping.binary_observable: exit 1 with 'Refusing mutating Wave 1 API smoke for non-local --base-url: https://example.com'; evidence contains no Coverage or Health section.

blocker_resolution_mapping.blocker: Cleanup DELETE status was not asserted
blocker_resolution_mapping.resolution: Cleanup DELETE now calls expectStatus(result, 200, label), so non-200 cleanup responses throw SmokeError and make the smoke fail.
blocker_resolution_mapping.binary_observable: Result PASS and every workflow/item/tag cleanup row records status 200.

blocker_resolution_mapping.blocker: Tags filter smoke did not prove AND semantics
blocker_resolution_mapping.resolution: Smoke now creates a both-tags item and a research-only control item, then asserts the both-tags query returns only the both-tags item and excludes the control.

blocker_resolution_mapping.blocker: package.json pnpm test became zero-test success
blocker_resolution_mapping.resolution: Default pnpm test now delegates to pnpm test:worker, preserving the worker command while making the default test gate execute real tests.
blocker_resolution_mapping.binary_observable: exit 0 with 6 test files and 26 tests passed.

blocker_resolution_mapping.blocker: Dev server child process forwarded broad process.env
blocker_resolution_mapping.resolution: Dev server child env now uses an explicit OS/runtime allowlist plus BROWSER and NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER, without spreading process.env.
blocker_resolution_mapping.scenario: Local dev server startup under allowlisted env
blocker_resolution_mapping.binary_observable: local Vite server started and smoke passed; dev stderr log is empty.

command_results.binary_observable: failed by remote HTML JSON parse, proving there was no explicit local-only refusal yet
explicit non-local refusal before health, POST, or DELETE coverage
Invalid --base-url failure before local app startup
PASS with health, item fallback, tags AND, favorite, workflow, malformed JSON 400, and cleanup 200 rows
PASS verify cleanup and Port 5173 listeners: 0

adversarial_qa.stale_state: Reran remote refusal, local smoke, typecheck, lint, pnpm test, pnpm test:worker, cleanup, and port probe after the last source edit.
adversarial_qa.dirty_worktree: Initial worktree was dirty; only scoped files were edited and no commit was made.
adversarial_qa.misleading_success_output: pnpm test now executes pnpm test:worker and reports 6 files / 26 tests instead of zero-test success.
adversarial_qa.malformed_input: not-a-url base URL exits 1 with Invalid --base-url evidence.
adversarial_qa.generated_cached_artifacts: Existing evidence was treated as untrusted; final artifacts were regenerated in this turn.
adversarial_qa.hung_or_long_commands: All commands completed within bounded tool timeouts; requestJson and readiness probes retain AbortSignal timeouts.
adversarial_qa.flaky_tests: Worker tests passed through both pnpm test and pnpm test:worker in separate invocations.
adversarial_qa.secret_exposure_env_forwarding: Child env now uses explicit allowlist; smoke dev stderr is empty and broad process.env spread was removed.

risks: Cleanup failure was code-audited rather than safely forced because deliberately breaking DELETE against the real local smoke would create leftover data risk.
The cleanup verifier heading still says Wave 0; left unchanged because it is outside the requested blockers and the body contains the Wave 1 evidence path and listener result.
Worktree had pre-existing Wave 1 product/evidence changes outside this fix scope; they were preserved.
